gcloud.description: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text v2 via gcloud CLI auth and direct REST requests

chirp_3.description: Chirp 3 synchronous transcription with diarization, automatic punctuation, and word timing

limits.notes: Google Cloud Speech-to-Text V2 synchronous Recognize requests are limited to 10 MB or 60 seconds for inline local audio. AutoShow uses the us-speech.googleapis.com regional endpoint with location us and relies on the existing split-and-merge path for larger inputs.
